scene_title: Estatua antiga com labios abertos prestes a falar
narrative_beat: Labios de pedra em ocre-dourado com fissuras carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid ancient stone statue with slightly parted lips as if about to speak with ochre and aged gold stone details and crimson glowing cracks in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the slightly parted stone lips with crimson glowing cracks
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated empty modern commercial street with dark storefronts and security cameras in background

environment.location: between ancient ruin and modern street

composition.foreground: lips and cracks in vivid ochre crimson

mood.emotion: the moment before the impossible happens — stone speaks

symbolism.primary: parted lips as the threshold between prophecy and fulfillment
symbolism.secondary: glowing cracks as fire of divinity breaking through the artificial

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
